lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: Uhh… Enzo, can you sign my application form for me, please?

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Yeah, just leave it there on the table.

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: But uh… I kinda need it right now.

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: The security guard won’t let me in the office.

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Help me with print these papers, think of it as your first task in The Paragon.

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: You help me, then I'll help you. Got it?

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Grab this stack of paper and bring them to the printer near the Librarian's desk, and start printing.

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: No? then what are you doing slaking off?

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Mmmhhhmm… page one to page fifty seven! A4, All complete with zero missing parts and jams.

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Nice job. Hand me your Club Application Form, I'll sign it.

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Here. now scraamm! I still got stuff to do.

lines.speaker: Enzo
lines.text: Huh? What are you doing here? Mrs. Santo is looking for you.
